project: a daily generative art practice, after Zach Lieberman
batch_note: Ten studies of one match — Argentina vs. Cabo Verde, Mundial 2026.

sketches.title: Órbitas
sketches.note: The goal as gravity, seen from above the plane: 33 shots on inclined Kepler ellipses around a glowing torus; the five goals spiral in at their minute and leave standing bells.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Minutos
sketches.note: The match told only in type: 120 minutes tick by, goal numerals slam full-width and stack into the ledger.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Sismógrafo
sketches.note: 120 stacked seismic traces, one per minute; shots tremble, goals spike off the chart.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Pileta
sketches.note: A miami hotel pool at night, from above: caustic filaments over the depth gradient, tile grid wobbling under the same refraction. Five standing ripple rings at the goal minutes on an invisible 120' clock — the 111' own goal rings twice. Settles, then the water keeps barely breathing.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Tapiz
sketches.note: The match hand-knotted as a pampa tapestry: guarda-pampa bands at the goal minutes, carved relief that catches the light, yarn twist, abrash, fringe — woven once on a bare warp.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Resonancia
sketches.note: A chladni plate sings the match: sand on dark steel migrates to the nodal lines as the drive sweeps five resonance modes, one per goal — agitated between tones, crisp when locked. Every finished mode leaves ~8% of its figure behind. Then the plate rests.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Terreno
sketches.note: A topographic paper relief of match pressure: shots as hills, goals as mountains, contours in ink.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Organismo
sketches.note: The match as a living culture: two physarum colonies (argentina 64%, cabo verde 36%) grow a transport network across a petri dish, feeding on five food bodies set at the goal minutes. The colonies braid, wall each other off at a dark seam, then the network is fixed.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.note: Every person in the stadium, one gpu point each — 64,478 souls leaning with the match; goals ripple through the crowd.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina

sketches.title: Bruma
sketches.note: The match as weather: five pigments arrive and melt through a nested domain warp into fluid tongues — ink in slow water. The dither lives in the pigment; flows once, then rests.
sketches.subject: Cabo Verde vs. Argentina
